title: Signal Coordinates
story: [Meridian-7 Log #003] Signal analysis has yielded a new discovery — coordinate identifiers are embedded in the data stream. Their format resembles human email addresses: an identifier, a locator symbol @, and a domain marker. This could be rEx's spatial positioning system. Extract all valid coordinate identifiers.
promptChallenge: Write a prompt to have AI generate a regex that precisely matches valid email addresses
hints: [Hint] This type of identifier contains only one @ symbol
[Hint] The domain part contains at least one separator
[Hint] Your instructions need to clearly describe the identifier's structure
promptHints: Try describing the components of an email in your prompt
Tell the AI: what characters can the username part contain?
Don't forget to have the AI handle edge cases

feedback.onPass: [Coordinates Extracted] This isn't random data. They point to a location.
feedback.onFail: [Parse Failed] Incomplete structure. The signal remains in disarray.
feedback.onPerfect: [Precise Lock] Every coordinate is accurate. The signal source's location is becoming clear.
feedback.onDirectWrite: [Manual Override] You don't need the assist system. You are the rules.
